# PHIL.006 ? Skepticism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** ancient_greek_roman
**Subcategory:** skepticism
**Domain:** ANCIENT_GREEK_ROMAN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Suspension of judgment on non-evident matters; questioning dogmatic claims; recognition of limits of knowledge; epoché (withholding assent)

## Application
Question assumptions; acknowledge uncertainty; avoid dogmatic claims; suspend judgment when evidence insufficient; maintain intellectual humility

## Key Values
- Doubt
- Inquiry
- Suspended judgment
- Anti-dogmatism

## Tags
philosophy, ancient-greek-roman, skepticism
